name: Apple Cheddar Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Combine the biscuit mix and cheddar cheese in a large bowl.
3. Stir in the milk and melted butter until well combined.
4. Pour the dough into two greased 8-inch layer pans.
5. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Prepare the apple topping by combining 3/4 cup packed brown sugar, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 2 tablespoons cornstarch, and 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon in a saucepan.
7. Stir in 1 cup water and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
8. Add the remaining apples and simmer until tender.
9. Spoon half of the apple mixture over one layer of shortcake.
10. Top with the second layer and remaining apple mixture.
11. Serve warm with whipped cream for topping.
